extraction.one_line_summary: DÉMARE Arnaud won stage 1 on a steep climb finishing 1km from the line, only rider able to match ALAPHILIPPE Julian's acceleration
tactical_patterns: FDJ matched Quickstep/Lotto crosswind proficiency despite lacking northern racing pedigree, CIMOLAI Davide key winter signing proved decisive.
ALAPHILIPPE Julian attacked steep climb with 1km remaining, only DÉMARE could follow revealing sprint-finish disadvantage against pure sprinters.
Crosswinds created multiple splits making front positioning more decisive than raw climbing ability for GC contenders.

rider_signals.DÉMARE Arnaud: positive: won stage and took leader's jersey while climbing with pure puncheurs, not just sprinting faster
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: 6 seconds from lead after nearly winning stage 1, minute ahead of CONTADOR despite being considered secondary GC option
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: negative: lost 15+ minutes stage 2 after already losing time stage 1, form collapse from Tour Down Under win
rider_signals.CIMOLAI Davide: positive: FDJ winter signing from Lampre immediately effective in crosswind positioning, unusual for new team recruit
rider_signals.IZAGIRRE Ion: negative: crashed off road during critical crosswind split stage 1 despite being in front group
rider_signals.KITTEL Marcel: negative: non-factor in sprints despite premium sprint field, condition questions early season
rider_signals.GREIPEL André: negative: non-factor in sprints contrary to expectations on paper sprint stages
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: neutral: yo-yoed badly first two hours stage 2 but teammates paced back before finale, maintaining GC position
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: positive: hung in with leaders stage 1 despite not being pure puncheur, remains GC contender
rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: neutral: finished with CONTADOR group after IZAGIRRE crash, maintaining position without showing superior form
